class.name: BlaziumGoapAction
class.brief_description: An action that an agent can perform to satisfy preconditions and apply effects to the world state.

method.name: _enter
method.description: Called securely by the Agent right before this action starts executing its [method _perform] loop natively. Use this to prepare state cleanly.

method.name: _exit
method.description: Called securely by the Agent immediately after the action finishes or aborts. Use this to clean up dynamically managed objects.

method.name: _get_cost
method.description: Calculates and returns the pathing cost. Override this to calculate dynamically contextual cost paths based on the simulated [param blackboard].

method.name: _is_valid
method.description: Called constantly on every process frame directly from the Agent's traversal monitor. If this returns false dynamically, the current Goap plan natively breaks and forces a complete replan instantly.

method.name: _perform
method.description: Executes the action logic per process tick. Return true when the action resolves its purpose cleanly.

method.name: _prepare_action
method.description: Evaluated exactly once linearly BEFORE the A* planner actively generates branches. Use this to bind calculated preconditions/effects dynamically instead of processing them iteratively inside the planner's engine loop.

method.name: apply_effects
method.description: Writes the [member effects] statically directly into the Agent's configured [BlaziumGoapWorldState].

method.name: get_action_name
method.description: Returns the object's configured node name natively.

method.name: get_agent
method.description: Returns the [BlaziumGoapAgent] natively resolving this action.

method.name: get_cost
method.description: Internal C++ cost evaluator wrapping around [method _get_cost] and base [member cost].

method.name: get_goal
method.description: Returns the exact goal currently orchestrating this instantiated process.

method.name: get_state
method.description: Reads values natively from the Agent's linked [BlaziumGoapWorldState].

method.name: init
method.description: Registers internal pointers explicitly tying the agent bounds together natively.

method.name: is_valid
method.description: Internal C++ valid checker tying into [method _is_valid].

method.name: set_state
method.description: Writes values natively mapping down directly into the Agent's linked [BlaziumGoapWorldState].

members.member: Static execution path cost calculated by the `AStar` planner logic.
Output property variables mapped automatically backward through the plan tracking into preconditions or goal state desires.
Determines cleanly whether this node is passed natively into the ActionPlanner's iteration tree graph!
Required state values natively expected to exist before this Action can actually execute natively.
